domain: Burmese Lethwei (Art of 9 Limbs, Myanmar bareknuckle martial art, 12th-c Pagan thaing origin): 9 attack limbs (2 fists + 2 elbows + 2 knees + 2 shins + headbutt); bareknuckle with only tape/gauze hand wraps; KO-revive 2-min timeout permits restart after knockout; village-festival origin; soldier self-defense root
specific_mechanism: LETHWEI-9-LIMB-BAREKNUCKLE-REVIVE-COEVOL: 9-attack-channel adversarial coevolution with bareknuckle no-glove direct input + 9th-limb signature headbutt + KO-revive checkpoint-rollback. (1) 9-attack-channel attacker A_1, ..., A_9 = 9 specialized attack heads (fist-L, fist-R, elbow-L, elbow-R, knee-L, knee-R, shin-L, shin-R, headbutt) each specialized in distinct attack-class. (2) Bareknuckle no-glove direct input: attacker output flows to defender with no smoothing/embedding-normalize intermediate layer — raw token-level adversarial perturbation. (3) 9th-limb signature attack (headbutt): high-impact attack class that bypasses standard surface-defenses, analog of meta-prompt or rare-syntax attack. (4) KO-revive 2-min timeout: when defender D fails (loss > tau_KO threshold), trigger recovery — checkpoint rollback to last-stable + selective fine-tune on KO-causing batch + resume coevolution. (5) 9-channel specialized defender D_1, ..., D_9: each defender channel fine-tuned on its limb's attack-distribution. (6) Differs from R484 TAKOUBA-LIGHTGEAR (light rapid cycles, no 9-channel + no KO-revive) and R497 PRADAL-8-LIMB-RED-TEAM (8-attack-type family, no 9th-limb signature + no KO-revive + no no-glove direct input) and R509 LAAMB-FRAPPE-GRAPPLE-DUAL-CHANNEL (2-channel grapple+frappe, no 9-channel + no KO-revive) by 9-attack-channel specialization + bareknuckle no-smoothing direct input + 9th-limb signature attack + KO-revive checkpoint-rollback timeout.
llm_application: LETHWEI-9-LIMB-BAREKNUCKLE-REVIVE-COEVOL 9-attack-channel adversarial coevolution + bareknuckle no-glove direct-input attacker-to-defender + 9th-limb headbutt signature high-impact bypass-defense attack + KO-revive 2-min timeout checkpoint-rollback + 9-channel specialized defender per-limb. Differs from R419 KOMI. R424 TLINGIT. R433. R437 BERBER. R459 KOMODO. R473 SUMO. R484 TAKOUBA-LIGHTGEAR. R497 PRADAL-8-LIMB-RED-TEAM (closest — 8 attack-type, no 9th-limb signature + no KO-revive). R509 LAAMB-FRAPPE-GRAPPLE-DUAL-CHANNEL (closest — dual-channel, no 9-channel + no KO-revive). Differs from ARLAS Adversarial RL + Continuous Attacks + ReFAT + Short-Length Adversarial 2502.04204 by 9-channel attack specialization + bareknuckle no-smoothing + 9th-limb signature attack + KO-revive checkpoint-rollback. Differs by 9-CHANNEL ATTACK + BAREKNUCKLE NO-SMOOTH + 9TH-LIMB SIGNATURE + KO-REVIVE TIMEOUT.
novelty_claim: ARLAS + Continuous Attacks + ReFAT + Short-Length Adversarial + multi-attack-class red-team literature cover adversarial coevolution + multi-attack space. LETHWEI-9-LIMB-BAREKNUCKLE-REVIVE-COEVOL adds (a) 9-attack-channel specialization + (b) bareknuckle no-smoothing direct input + (c) 9th-limb signature attack + (d) KO-revive checkpoint-rollback. Recombination — borderline lookup.
